title: solenostemon monostachyus
intro: Solenostemon monostachyus, also known as Coleus or African Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Solenostemon monostachyus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
